itinerary.title: Trivandrum City Tour
itinerary.description: Explore Trivandrum. Visit the historic Sree Padmanabhaswamy Temple, the Zoo, the Planetarium, ISRO display, and the Art Gallery. (Note: Itinerary details are subject to change).

itinerary.title: Kanyakumari & Kovalam Beach
itinerary.description: Travel to Kanyakumari. Visit the Vivekananda Rock Memorial (Vivekananda Para), the Padmanabhapuram Palace, and relax on the golden sands of Kovalam Beach. (Note: Itinerary details are subject to change).

itinerary.title: Thenmala Eco-Tourism & Waterfalls
itinerary.description: Discover Thenmala Eco-Tourism. Visit Thenmala Dam, the Deer Park, Palaruvi and Kuttalam waterfalls, and watch the evening Laser Show before departure. (Note: Itinerary details are subject to change).

title: Trivandrum, Kanyakumari & Thenmala
description: Experience the culture, beaches, and natural beauty of Southern India. Explore Trivandrum's temples and galleries, see Kanyakumari's famous rock memorial, enjoy Kovalam Beach, and experience eco-tourism and waterfalls in Thenmala.
highlights: Visit Padmanabha Swami Temple, Trivandrum Zoo, and Art Gallery
Explore Kanyakumari and Vivekananda Rock Memorial (Vivekananda Para)
Relax on Kovalam Beach and visit Kanyakumari Palace
See Thenmala Dam, Palaruvi Water Falls, Kuttalam Waterfalls, and the Laser Show
Please note: Itinerary details are subject to change
